normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 4.1 - Royal Australian Air Force Association Masterplan
scope_summary: Site-specific local planning policy relating to the Royal Australian Air Force Association (RAAFA) masterplan within the City of Melville. The extracted text contains only the policy header (Policy No. LPP 4.1, last review 25 October 2019) and the references/review history; the substantive policy statement and masterplan content are absent from the extraction, so the controls it applies cannot be analysed from this text. References indicate it operates alongside LPS6 and SPP 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volumes 1 and 2.

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
State Planning Policy 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volume 1
State Planning Policy 7.3 Residential Design Codes Volume 2 - Apartments

quality_flags: Policy statement/body missing from extracted text - only the header block and references/review history were captured (2 pages)
Masterplan content (objectives, controls, plans) likely graphical or contained in attachments not captured by text extraction; no numeric standards or definitions analysable
Source PDF itself may be a header/registry sheet only - recommend re-fetch or manual check of the canonical URL
